changelog: publish.js path-remap (workshop docs/concepts|guides|reference|README|CLAUDE|getting-started → .claude/.agents.docs/ at adopter), scaffold.js managed-block merge for .gitignore (preserves adopter customizations across re-scaffolds), test sources now ship (__tests__/ + _helpers/ included; coverage/test-results excluded), .githooks/ template retired in favor of Claude Code PreToolUse hooks for secret-scanning (workshop pre-commit deleted, scaffold core.hooksPath block removed, template-updater ROOT_TEMPLATE_DIRS emptied, guardrail-rules.yaml rule retired), inner gitignore rename fix (templates/root/.gitignore → gitignore so git stops treating it as an active gitignore at the template path).
